offer: For Amazon sellers processing 20-50 shipments/month, stock shortages cause lost sales. We provide real-time inventory monitoring instead of manual inventory tracking and alerts via email.
problem: Stock shortages leading to lost sales
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Amazon sellers

Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users

automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
